runTitle: Local Dashboard Server Layout QA - Card Density and Mobile Detail Overflow

artifacts.label: Desktop server cards after density fix
Mobile server detail after overflow fix

completedImprovements.title: Desktop server cards use 4-column dense grid at xl width
completedImprovements.evidence: 1440px grid columns measured as 307px x 4; overflowX=false

completedImprovements.title: Mobile server detail has no page horizontal overflow or control overlap
completedImprovements.evidence: 390px viewport bodyScrollWidth=390, overlaps=[]; targeted Playwright guard passed

notes: Local dev QA only; AI behavior was not changed and conversational AI QA was skipped.
Server detail page was checked at 390x844 mobile viewport and 1440x1000 desktop viewport.

Targeted E2E: PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_REPORT=0 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-server-cards.spec.ts --grep "모바일 서버 상세 route" --project=chromium
